name_en: 【Premium Quality】M11471 Blue Porte Cartes Double Wallet. A double card holder crafted from Monogram Eclipse Reverse canvas. It features four card slots, a central pocket for receipts, and a turquoise leather strap at the top for a vibrant touch. Fits most pocket-sized items. 11 x 7 x 1.5 cm.
